Whirlwind of Fury

Triggers: Once in a while

Blade Whirlwind
A whirlwind begins and lasts for 3 sec. Every 0.5 sec the whirlwind tears the armor of a random enemy. When the enemy's armor is torn, that enemy takes 80000 pure damage and has their physical armor reduced by 15% for 5 sec. Up to 3 effects. Also, that enemy takes 120000 physical damage over 5 sec.

Requirements: 90-100
